mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moment (title, content, images, like_count, view_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{images}, 0, 0, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM moment WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE moment SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE moment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
